title: Maoist China
symbolicOrderDefinition: Draft operational shorthand for the durable shared meanings, legitimacy claims, memory, obligation, and sacrifice logic associated with Maoist China.
symbolicOrderStrengthRationale: Provisional scaffold score based on the case outcome category; requires evidence-chain review before scholarly use.
selectionRationale: Included to test the sacrificial-escalation pathway under strong symbolic-order pressure.
theoryTest: Tests the relationship among symbolic-order strength, crisis pressure, corrigibility, and sacrifice.
